metadata.title: Hispanic Clinics Houston | Clinica Hispana Cruz 3 | Spanish Speaking Doctors
metadata.description: One of the top hispanic clinics in Houston TX. 100% Spanish medical care, walk-ins welcome. Family medicine, gynecology, diabetes care, laboratory. No insurance required; affordable self-pay pricing. Call: (832) 323-2330

info.footerNote: We are located in the heart of Houston, with easy access and free parking.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions about Our Hispanic Clinic
faq.subtitle: Answers to common questions about our medical services in Houston
faq.a1: No, we accept walk-in patients. Simply come to our clinic during business hours and we'll see you as soon as possible. However, if you prefer to secure a specific time slot, you can call us to make an appointment.
faq.q2: Do you accept patients without insurance?
faq.a2: Yes. You don't need insurance to be seen. We offer affordable self-pay pricing and accept cash and cards so everyone can receive the medical care they need.
faq.q3: Do you speak Spanish at the clinic?
faq.a3: Yes, all our staff speaks Spanish. Our clinic was specifically created to serve Houston's Hispanic community, and we make sure you can communicate comfortably in your language.
faq.a4: We're open Monday through Sunday. Our regular hours are 9:00 AM to 9:00 PM every day. Please call us to confirm hours on holidays.
faq.q5: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a5: We accept cash and all major credit and debit cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express, Discover). We offer affordable, transparent pricing, and we welcome patients without insurance.
faq.a6: Yes, we offer flexible payment plans to help you manage your healthcare costs. Talk to our receptionist about the options available for your particular situation.
faq.q7: Where are you located in Houston?
faq.a7: We are located at 5411 S Braeswood Blvd, Houston, TX 77096, in the north Houston area near Highway 59/69. We have ample free parking and easy access by public transportation.
faq.q8: Do you perform I-693 immigration medical exams?
faq.a8: Yes, we have USCIS-certified Civil Surgeon physicians to perform the I-693 immigration medical exam required for the Green Card. We offer fast results, on-site vaccines, and 100% Spanish-language service.
faq.q9: How long is the wait without an appointment?
faq.a9: Wait times vary depending on daily demand, but we generally see patients within 15-30 minutes. We recommend arriving early to ensure faster service.
faq.a10: Yes, we have ample free parking in front of the clinic. Our facilities are also accessible for people with disabilities, including ramps and adapted restrooms.

greenCard.title: Immigration Medical Exams I-693
greenCard.subtitle: Clínica Hispana Cruz #3 is your USCIS authorized Hispanic clinic for I-693 immigration medical exams in Houston. Our certified Civil Surgeons help you with your Green Card process quickly and in Spanish.

chronicCare.title: Diabetes & Hypertension Management in Houston
chronicCare.subtitle: Comprehensive monitoring and treatment program for diabetes, hypertension, high cholesterol, and thyroid conditions. Same-day lab results, medication adjustments, and patient education in Spanish.

promotions.title: Health Promotions & Packages
promotions.subtitle: Take advantage of our affordable medical packages in Houston, TX. 100% Spanish-speaking care, walk-ins welcome, and no insurance required.
promotions.pageTitle: Promotions at Our Hispanic Clinic in Houston
promotions.pageSubtitle: Affordable medical packages. 100% Spanish-speaking care, walk-ins welcome, and no insurance required.

faq.q1: How long are the promotions available?
faq.a1: Our promotions are for a limited time and prices may change. We recommend calling or writing to us to confirm availability and schedule your appointment.
faq.q2: Do I need an appointment or medical insurance?
faq.a2: You do not need medical insurance. We welcome walk-ins and you can also schedule in advance. We offer affordable self-pay prices.
faq.q3: How do I book a promotion?
faq.a3: You can call us, use the Get directions button to visit us, or fill out the contact form and our team will reach out to coordinate your appointment.
